data.content: Implemented beat-scoped token usage attribution fix in worktree branch foolery-81ad. logTokenUsageForEvent now persists usage only when a completed event resolves to exactly one beat, preventing multi-beat scene/direct fan-out; initial child close-path buffering now applies the same token logging so final buffered turn.completed events are saved consistently. Added unit coverage for single-beat logging and multi-beat skip behavior. Validation: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Commit pushed: fdfcce1f72fb.
